## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it's needed -->


## Type of change

<!-- Use conventional commit type: feat, fix, chore, refactor, perf, docs, ci, test, style -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, dependencies, tooling
- [ ] `refactor` — Code change without feature/fix
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI / Build only
- [ ] `test` — Test only
- [ ] `style` — Formatting, linting (no logic change)

## How to test?

<!-- Steps for another developer to verify the change -->


## Screenshots

<!-- Add screenshots or a video demonstrating the change -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no new issues
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`type: description`)
